items.fight_news: In an unprecedented spectacle on the White House lawn, Ilia Topuria looks to solidify his undisputed lightweight reign against the ultimate action fighter, Justin Gaethje.
Analytically, this phenomenal title unification bout hinges entirely on Topuria's crisp pocket boxing matching up against Gaethje's legendary leg kicks and violent forward pressure.
Alex Pereira vacates his 205-pound title to chase two-division supremacy in a highly anticipated interim heavyweight title bout against former interim champ Ciryl Gane.
The core stylistic question is whether Pereira's transcendent, one-punch knockout power can find a home against the elusive, movement-heavy approach of the French heavyweight.
Fan-favorite Sean O'Malley faces a highly disciplined test in Aiemann Zahabi as he looks to re-establish his dominance in a crowded bantamweight division.
The tactical preview revolves around O'Malley's sniper-like distance management going head-to-head against Zahabi's patient and lethal counter-striking.
A massive heavyweight collision pits the raw wrestling power of Josh Hokit against the UFC's all-time knockout king, Derrick Lewis.
The narrative gives us a quintessential grappler-versus-striker matchup, with Hokit desperately needing to survive the terrifying power of Lewis's first-round blitzes to impose his ground game.
Veteran Michael Chandler brings his explosive, fan-friendly style back to the Octagon against the rapidly rising Brazilian prospect Maurício Ruffy.
Expect pure violence early on, as Chandler's hyper-aggressive forward pressure clashes beautifully with Ruffy's sharp, technical striking skills.
Undefeated wrestling phenom Bo Nickal takes a significant step up in competition against the highly experienced submission specialist Kyle Daukaus.
It is an elite grappling showdown that will test whether Nickal's raw wrestling superiority can safely navigate the tricky submission threats that Daukaus is famous for.
Opening up the main card, Diego Lopes brings his wildly aggressive submission and striking game against the gritty, battle-tested Steve Garcia.
This featherweight bout promises high action from the first bell, with Garcia's technical boxing tested by Lopes' sheer unpredictability and finishing instincts.
